deliverable_layout.forecasts.jsonl: curated FD subset, one record per line
deliverable_layout.articles.jsonl: only articles referenced by the subset, full text
deliverable_layout.facts.jsonl: ETD atomic facts whose primary_article_id is in this subset's articles.jsonl (may be empty if Stage 1 ETD has not been run for the parent cutoff)
deliverable_layout.schema/: self-contained JSON Schema for FD + article + ETD fact
deliverable_layout.meta/: per-FD audit + distribution stats + parent SHA
